feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Payroll data extraction before release to accounting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Please help in extracting monthly SAP HR payroll data from HCM before it is actually release to accounts.

appreciate your help.

regards

zaks

entry.title: W2 Box 14 reporting wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES
entry.content:
When we run W2’s we found that W2 Box 14 is reporting the wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES for non-Alabama employees that has overtime wages but doesn’t have wage type /PPE.

However, this is working as expected for AL employees that has OT and wage type /PPE in the results table.

entry.title: synchronization between employee and business partner, when CP is related to 2 different pernr
entry.content: S/4Hana, synchronization between employees and business partners, when employee has 2 different personnel numbers one inactive and one active, a new business partner was not created. When running program /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE with the new pernr the message is: pernr was successfully synchronized , however no new business partner has been created, and no change has occurred to the previous business partner.

entry.title: LSMW issue with assigning info type to an object type in CR02_SOLVED, pls ignore
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

For PP work center Qualification control,  there is an integration between PP work center and HR work center (Object type A) to which qualifications are assigned. (See ill. 1: CR02-HRMS-Qualification)

In LSMW batch input recording,  always encounter the issue that the ticking of the check box is not recorded which results in the failure when executing the LSMW. 

Shown below, after specifying the Object type, need to tick the check box. But the action can not be captured in recording.

Please kindly advise if you have any experience on this.

Sally

entry.title: Eseparation - Withdrawal request
entry.content:
We have configured E-separation solution. Initiation is working fine but if initiator/ employee withdraws the request, we are getting error and not able to perform the withdrawal request.

"You are not authorized to perform this action for this request"

Authorizations are fine.

entry.title: hi,we are also facing same issue .there is any solution for these?
BIB Integration issue from SAP to Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently transferring Global Info data from SAP to Success Factors, via the SF Personal Info section. The entity ID used for this process in SAP is: "ERP_WS_18_GBR - Global Info UK Template for Web Service."

We are running the standard SAP program "ECPAO_EMPL_DMT_JOB_SCHEDULER" for this purpose. However, we have observed errors in SLG1 below  scenario during the transfer process.

Scenario:Edit/change Infotype 0002(Personal Info)  align with SF Personal Info date and no change in master data. (IT9600) Global info diversity.

Result: The data will flow successfully to SuccessFactors (SF). However  diversity information in SuccessFactors will be deleted.

Any suggestion for above issue

entry.title: How to configure & view the ESOP amount to display in Form 16 & in which section ? Need urgent help
entry.content: Hi. I have a wagetype configured for maintaining ESOP amount in Infotype 15 . It is reflecting in Annual Perk but not in Form 16 of the employee ? How to do this ?

entry.title: How to integrate HCM with other non SAP Apps?
entry.content:
Hey All, 
how we integrate SAP HCM to other Apps( non SAP). I have a product ( Testfuse) that conduct the candidate assessment. I want to integrate this into SAP HCM to help the requirement process. 

The scenario of integration will be as :

  • When candidate gets shortlisted the details of candidates ( email) should be sent to testfuse to invite a candidate for an assessment. 
  • The candidate will be then invited by testfuse and they perform the assessment in testfuse.
  • After the assessment the job fitness score will be calculated in testfuse and recruiter observe the results of candidate.
  • When  recruiter  change the status of the candidate in testfuse the status should also be changed in HCM. 


So what will be the guidelines to implement this integrations and also we have oauth to verify the integrated apps in testfuse. 

Anyone help to implement this integration. 

HCM (Human Capital Management) SAP Cloud Integration for data services

entry.title: Canvas report Vacant Position, need to filter only current incumbent data
entry.content:
I have built a canvas report to view vacant positions. I have used the calculated column if Incumbent User Id is blank and Incumbent Employee Status is Separated then it should be a vacant position. 

The issue I am facing is all incumbents tagged previously to the position are shown in the report, and not the current status of the Incumbent alone. Is there a way to filter only the current incumbent status.

entry.title: "Revolutionizing SAP Recruitment with HireRig.AI"
entry.content:
The new white paper on HireRig.AI presents an innovative approach to SAP recruitment, addressing key challenges faced by businesses in adapting to rapid technological changes. By leveraging AI-driven, project-based hiring, HireRig.AI is set to transform traditional recruitment methods, eliminating biases, accelerating the hiring process, and ensuring a more accurate match between candidates’ skills and SAP project requirements.

Key insights from the white paper include:

  • How project-based hiring through HireRig.AI enhances recruitment efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Real-world case studies demonstrating the platform’s impact on reducing time-to-hire and mitigating project delays.
  • The cost-saving potential of flexible, scalable hiring models for SAP businesses. 

Link - https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7272695170360328192?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop

For an in-depth exploration of how HireRig.AI can revolutionize your SAP talent acquisition strategy, I invite you to read the full white paper. Let’s collaborate to shape the future of SAP recruitment and drive innovation in the technical hiring ecosystem. Transform the Future of SAP Recruitment with HireRig.AI

entry.title: How to filter for Infotype 7 Field status time management in H99_HRFORMS_CALL?
entry.content:
Hi, when using PT61 for creating time statements, employees that do not participate in time management (infotype 0007 field Status time management / zterf subtype 0) are automatically excluded. The problem is PT61 can not create HRFORMS documents but only ABAP Lists. 

We therefore use H99_HRFORMS_CALL for creating time statements based on HRFORMS. The problem here is this program does not automatically exclude employees that do not participate in time management and therefore creates empty pages for those and there is no standard selection option to exclude these employees. Is it possible to create this selection option without programming or is there an easy programming solution?

A workaround would be copying those employee numbers in SE16n and excluding them in H99_HRFORMS_CALL each time we create time statements but this is not ideal.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: After creating a new work schedule, while running time evaluation it is showing error.
entry.content:
Hi,

 Created a new work schedule and after assigning it to IT0007 and running time evaluation, it is showing this error 

Can someone explain on what can be done

entry.title: IT582 Exemption
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

As I am a freshman, guide me to achieve this requirement Internet allowance exemptions WT 2S31 (copied from MCAX). subtype for Exemptions infotype (0582) - "ZINT."

Under New Tax Reg paying through IT0014, need exemption until Rs. 5000.If the bill amount in IT582 exceeds the amount in IT0014, the full amount should be taxable. How can I achieve this?. Where can I see the changes in the RT log?

I have maintained below-listed tables & Schema

V_T7INT7: Define Tax Codes
V_T7INT9: Assign Tax Code Limits to Wage Types
V_T7INA9: Calculate Eligibility for RAPs
In schema (INN1) payroll function (INCTX),


 
My question is, where can I see those exemptions and taxable amounts?

If I check on PC 30 32 33, I am facing this error (screenshot below). 

By analysing the error, I don't have any duplicate entries in IT0014.

Also, suggest me PC, CC, and EC for the WT 2S31 and share a screenshot of the RT log /130 and /4.. series screenshot before and after exemptions.

Your input is appreciated. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Help Me Understand Exemptions IT0582
entry.content:
Understanding the Requirement
As a freshman, I need guidance on achieving Internet allowance exemptions WT 2S31. This requirement is copied from MCAX and falls under the subtype for Exemptions infotype (0582) - ZINT.

Exemption Limit
Under the new tax regulations, payments are made through IT0014, and exemptions are allowed up to Rs.5000. If the bill amount in IT582 exceeds the amount in IT0014, the full amount becomes taxable. How can I make sure I meet this requirement?

Maintained Tables & Schema
I have maintained the following tables and schema based on the Configuration Link:
Link: https://help.sap.com/saphelp_erp60_sp/helpdata/en/a3/3be153038a424de10000000a174cb4/content.htm?no_cache=true
- V_T7INT7: Define Tax Codes
- V_T7INT9: Assign Tax Code Limits to Wage Types
- V_T7INA9: Calculate Eligibility for RAPs
In the schema (INN1) payroll function (INCTX).
INCTX    SEXM     MCAX     R     MCMX

Where to Find Exemptions and Taxable Amounts ?
If I check on PC 30 32 33, I am encountering an error (see screenshot below).

Error Analysis
Upon analysing the error, I found no duplicate entries in IT0014.

Request for PC, CC, and EC & Exemp in Result table
Please suggest the PC, CC, and EC for the WT 2S31 and provide screenshots of the RT log /130 and /4.. series Before, After exemptions, & taxable.

Your help is greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: My Inbox Fiori App Performance Issue Due Reading unnecessary Work Items in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have implemented the My Inbox Fiori application in our S/4HANA system, where multiple workflow tasks  are configured for decisions like leave requests and service entries. However, we are facing a performance issue: the My Inbox app takes an unusually long time to load, even for just four line items.

Our technical consultant investigated the issue and found that the app is reading a significant amount of data from CATSDB work items in the backend. These CATSDB entries contain numerous line items, which seems to be causing the delay.

Since CATSDB-relevant data is not required in our My Inbox application, we are looking for a solution to exclude or filter out this data to improve the app's performance.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? How can we prevent My Inbox from reading unnecessary CATSDB work items or optimize the data retrieval process? Any advice, configuration tips, or notes would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Issue with Compensation module and Manager Rollup Summary export calculations
entry.content: We are in the middle of year end processes for 2024 doing annual salary reviews.  We have noticed that when we go to our Compensation Admin role and select the current year ASR form and do a manager roll up summary export on all employees, the numbers being displayed on the page differ from a manual formula calculation in Excel in many of the columns.  We did not experience this issue last year.  We took a copy of the previous year form and tested it in QA then moved it to PROD.  The problem is, we can really only test some scenarios with a limited data entry set so we didn't see anything wrong in QA.  Now that it's in PROD and tens of thousands of entries have been made, we are seeing the calculation issue.  We've checked the obvious like errors in the formula and making sure the span is correct.  We've run it at various times of the day and we've pushed manual updates to the worksheet and then rerun the report.  It takes almost an hour and a half for the report to be generated.  We are US based so I even went in after hours, ran export at 9:30PM, ran the worksheet update at around 11:15PM and there were still issues in the count.  I was doing that in case the system was still allowing for entries to be added during the export process while it takes it's time generating.  While I can't rule it out entirely, the likelihood of someone being online at that time making entries is extremely low.  This of course assumes the export does allow for entries made after it is kicked off to be shown vs a snapshot of all data at a point in time.  Any thoughts would be appreciated.

entry.title: Transport request without direct connection from Non-prod to Prod environment
entry.content:
Currently, we are using STMS to transport TRs from Non-Prod to Prod environment. There's an IT security requirement that discourage direct connection establish from non-prod environment to prod environment, vice versa.

How can we use STMS without establishing direct connections between non-production and production system? What is the best strategy that ensures security and compliance with the restriction of direct communication between these environments.

entry.title: PY-US-NT-GR- auto-assigned incorrectly when creating IT0194
entry.content:
Hello, We've identified an issue within the SAP garnishment module when creating IT0194, where the internal number isn't being auto-assigned correctly. For instance, when creating a new garnishment record for employee 20112865, the system is auto-populating an existing internal number (0002), which is already active and has deductions. This leads to the existing record being overwritten when the expectation was for a new number (0006) to be assigned.

Additionally, we've discovered that the garnishment processor can input a subtype from the PA30 Maintain HR Master Data screen in SAP, which is causing complications with garnishment record setups. This unexpected capability needs to be addressed, and we plan to raise a note with SAP to investigate why this is allowed and how it can be corrected.

Using the same employee example, the issue arose when a specialist entered "1" in the subtype field before accessing the garnishment module. This action prevents the record number from being auto-assigned, leading to cascading effects on subsequent garnishment setups, as seen with the initial example.

We attempted to correct this by updating the record from 1 to 0001 in SAP"s backend. However, creating a new record still resulted in the original issue, where an active internal record number was mistakenly overwritten, causing incorrect delimiting of the existing record.

If you would like to look at our employee in our test system (S03), please let me know and I get our security team to open up the system to you but before I do that wanted to get your input first, just incase you already know about this issue we are having.

Sincerely,

Bonnie Bazargan 

 

This situation presents a compliance risk and needs urgent resolution.

entry.title: Document Completed Notification to Manager
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to understand two things.

1 - Why a recipient is receiving the notification below, It says Manager, and they are a manager, but no other managers are receiving this notification

2 - Which document is being triggered for this notification. 

Appreciate any help to resolve this.
